title: Finnish Views on Sustainable Development 2018
description: This dataset contains writings on sustainable development, obtained through a Finnish Literature Society (SKS) writing competition. In the invitation to write, the participants were asked to describe their thoughts on sustainable development and how sustainability was visible in their life and the lives of people close to them. Additionally, they were asked to describe their own choices regarding sustainability and the reasons behind those choices, as well as what kinds of choices they would be
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
